title: Big projects eating me up vs Mishpat order demands for pulsing
author: joshualinog
excerpt: # non - terminating Mishpat activities # 3-6 month terminating projects - [ ]  ken land agreements written - [ ] ken agreements mediated  - [ ] Joe Shea raised up - [ ] raising up Peter in this season
body:
# non - terminating Mishpat activities
# 3-6 month terminating projects
- [ ]  ken land agreements written
- [ ] ken agreements mediated 
- [ ] Joe Shea raised up
- [ ] raising up Peter in this season and covering Peter to join rency
- [ ] trying to initiate public buildup and transform buildup into a repeatable practice
- [ ] ken culvert drive project
- [ ] ken utilities (well water/ electrical/ Internet) project
- [ ] laying out fenced in area project
- [ ] detransitioning off Christi land
- [ ] transitioning onto ken land
- [ ] building our housing 
# 1-2 year terminating projects
- [ ] finding land property for permanent purchase 
- [ ] developing said property for village
- [ ] completing foundation course
